reference: Hi, we are trying for a child. I have gone through a follicular scan. On the 20th day, I was given an injection and suggested to have intercourse for three days, as it was the time of ovulation. I was provided with some tablets to take from the day of the injection for ten days. The name of the tablet is Meprate. I have a few queries. Will I get my period immediately after I stop taking the pills if I am not pregnant? When can I do a home pregnancy test? If the human chorionic gonadotropin content is low in my urine, should I opt for a blood test?
text: Hi, we are trying for a child. I have gone through a previous plan. On the twentieth day, I was given an induction, which suggests me having to force a three days, as it is the time of ovulation. I was provided with a tablet taken in the day of the induction for ten days. The name of the tablet is Metrix. I have a few queries. Will I get my period immediately after I start taking the pills if I am not pregnant? When can I do a home pregnancy test? If the human chorionic gonadotropin content is low in my urine, should I opt for a blood test?
